name: Focused Aquamirror
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>水</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>集</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Add 1 "Gishki" monster from your Deck to your hand. During the End Phase, if you control a WATER Ritual Monster: You can banish this card from your GY; Set 1 "Aquamirror" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck or GY, except "Focused Aquamirror". You can only use this effect of "Focused Aquamirror" once per turn.
eff: Add 1 "Gishki" monster from your Deck to your hand. During the End Phase, if you control a WATER Ritual Monster: You can banish this card from your GY; Set 1 "Aquamirror" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck or GY, except "Focused Aquamirror". You can only use this effect of "Focused Aquamirror" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
